industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Aksu Enerji ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Aksu Enerji ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the operation of hydroelectric power plant in Turkey. It produces and distributes hydroelectric power. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Isparta, Turkey.
